problem id: 88c482d3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01100110 -> 10011000
  11001101 -> 00110101
  10000000 -> 00000001
  11101110 -> 10111001
  00100001 -> 10000100
  00001110 -> 00111000
  10101111 -> 10111101
  10111011 -> 11101101

query: 10001000
predicted answer: 00100001
